jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at MRF
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Plant Manager looking for your next big career move? MRF in Hyderabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About MRF:
MRF is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MRF!
